use_codes.desc: ONCE DAILY TREATMENT OF ASTHMA WITH NEBULIZED BUDESONIDE
ONCE DAILY DOSING OF BUDESONIDE VIA NEBULIZER FOR THE TREATMENT OF ASTHMA
TREATMENT OF ASTHMA (MAINTENANCE AND PROPHYLACTIC THERAPY)

indications.text:
PULMICORT RESPULES is indicated for the maintenance
treatment of asthma and as prophylactic therapy in children
12 months to 8 years of age.
PULMICORT RESPULES is NOT indicated for the relief of acute
bronchospasm.

1.1 Maintenance Treatment of Asthma
PULMICORT RESPULES is indicated for the maintenance treatment of asthma and as prophylactic therapy in children
12 months to 8 years of age.
Limitations of Use:
• PULMICORT RESPULES is NOT indicated for the relief of acute bronchospasm.

11 DESCRIPTION
1.1 Maintenance Treatment of Asthma
12 CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY

PULMICORT RESPULES is indicated for the maintenance treatment of asthma and as
prophylactic therapy in children 12 months to 8 years of age.
PULMICORT RESPULES is NOT indicated for the relief of acute bronchospasm.

PULMICORT TURBUHALER is indicated for the maintenance
treatment of asthma as prophylactic therapy in adult and pediatric
patients six years of age or older. It is also indicated for patients
requiring oral corticosteroid therapy for asthma. Many of those
